nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联114种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等114种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 紅嘴鳳冠雉
nodes.summary: 紅嘴鳳冠雉（Red-billed curassow，学名 Crax blumenbachii），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入凤冠雉科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、森林砍伐、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: 凤冠雉科
nodes.summary: 凤冠雉科（Cracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联56种鸟类，如山冠雉、Black guan、Sickle-winged guan等56种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Accessed 2008-10-02 due to hunting and deforestation, and it has possibly been extirpated from Minas Gerais

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Accessed 2008-10-02 due to hunting and deforestation, and it has possibly been extirpated from Minas Gerais

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The red-billed curassow has a very limited range in eastern Brazil and populations there are declining because of habitat loss and hunting
